R: Resource management

R.10: Avoid malloc() and free()

Reason

malloc() and free() do not support construction and destruction.

Enforcement

Flag explicit use of malloc and free.

R.11: Avoid calling new and delete explicitly

Prefer RAII and smart pointers over naked new/delete.

CP: Concurrency

CP.20: Use RAII, never plain lock()/unlock()

Use lock guards instead of manual locking.
